title: Death Announcement
description: A Datapack that announces the death from players
body:
An useful tool for showing dramatic announcements when a player from your server dies. The announcement appears as a title, and shows the name of the player that died along with the wither.spawn sound.

Very convenient for Hardcore servers or one-life minigames that need a notorious warning when any player dies. In case of a Hardcore server, it is highly recommended that you use it together with my other datapack [Totem Alert](https://modrinth.com/project/ph06cCoD), that does a similar thing but notifying in the chat when any player uses a Totem of Undying.
